name: Dusit Thani Public Company Limited
summary: Dusit Thani Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates hotels and resorts in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Hotel and Hotel Management, Education, Foods, and Others. It operates hotels under the Dusit Thani, Dusit Devarana, dusitD2, Dusit Princess, ASAI HOTELS, Elite Havens, and Dusit Residence brands; spas which provide various treatments, including massages, facials, body treatments, and various exclusive programs under the Devarana Spa, Namm Spa, DVN Spa, d v n urban, and dvn brands; and healthy food restaurants. The company also provides hotel management and consultancy services; as well as engages in the food and beverage catering, and distribution business. In addition, it operates Dusit Thani College that offers undergraduate and postgraduate hospitality degrees; Dusit Thani Excellence Centre, which provides short courses and corporate training services; and as a REIT manager for real estate investment trust. Further, the company is involved in the leasing and sub-leasing of properties business. Dusit Thani Public Company Limited was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
